data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for recovery campaign triggers.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the recovery campaign triggers (email/SMS/push), but the evidence provided does not include any specific checks or confirmations related to these triggers. The linked use case mentions the need for recovery campaign triggers, yet there is no concrete evidence demonstrating their implementation or validation. This leads to a conclusion that the validation step is blocked due to insufficient evidence.
gaps: No evidence of recovery campaign triggers (email/SMS/push).

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the recovery campaign triggers.
